title: Run determinism and redaction tests
description: Execute or scaffold tests that assert byte-identical assembly for fixed inputs and that seeded PII is redacted before the request.
body: Use when validating a prompt-pipeline change. Procedure: run a snapshot test that the same inputs assemble a byte-identical prompt across runs, and run redaction tests that seed PII and assert it is absent from the assembled outbound request; if such tests are absent, scaffold the minimal cases (snapshot, seeded email/id, delimiter-breakout). Report which cases pass and which leak or vary. This skill exposes capability only and must not run against production data with real PII. Risk boundary: a pipeline change without passing determinism and redaction tests is unverified and must not be reported as done.
